title: derris thorelii
intro: Derris thorelii, also known as the Pongamia pinnata or Derris tree, is a tropical legume native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Derris thorelii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Derris thorelii can be prepared in various forms, including oil, tincture, and decoction, which can be used externally for skin conditions or internally for digestive issues and fever.
